published_prior_art.cite: GalNedoma1972 and BemporadMorariDuaPistikopoulos2002: generic multiparametric LP/QP critical-region active-set decomposition

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_spectral_phase_transition/p1_markov is Markov/FWL row-space phase transition; pid_did_anticipation_bounded/v1 is independent-box anticipation bounds, not coupled Honest-DiD RR/ARP path

published_prior_art.cite: RambachanRoth2023 fixed-M Honest-DiD; AndrewsRothPakes2023 fixed linear CMI inference; no verified source gives the ordered Honest-DiD active-face zero-inclusion certificate
FangSantos2019 directionally differentiable inference and KaidoMolinariStoye2022 constraint qualifications cover much of the generic tied-face/nonsmooth machinery
MastenPoirier2020 develops inference on breakdown frontiers; RambachanRoth2023 already notes a one-sided CI for M_star and leaves uniform frontier coverage to future work

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The deterministic active-region/KKT partition is essentially generic multiparametric programming; row labels make it useful bookkeeping but not a new theorem kernel.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3
novelty_flags.one_line: The comparison to RambachanRoth2023 underplays their footnote giving a valid one-sided confidence interval for M_star under fixed-M size control; the remaining gap is sharper local/tie inference, not first inference for a breakdown value.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2 | Conjecture 3
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses FirpoGalvaoParker2023, 'Uniform inference for value functions,' a closer comparator for bootstrap/directional inference after optimization over active sets.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; to plausibly reach flagship, the proposal needs a generic-class obstruction or theorem for RR/ARP moving critical values beyond the single Honest-DiD path.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The tied setup defines Q={(F_1,J_1),...,(F_s,J_s)} but uses intersections and equality events over r=1..q and G_1=...=G_q; q is the number of inequalities, not the number of tied faces.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The plug-in tied confidence set inherits the malformed tied quotient event from the setup, so the estimated event and critical value are not well-defined until the s-versus-q indexing is fixed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rewrite the RambachanRoth2023 comparison to explicitly account for their one-sided M_star confidence-interval observation, then isolate the added contribution as two-sided/local/tie-robust inference for the RR/ARP moving-critical-value crossing.
Fix the tied-face notation by separating q canonical inequalities from s tied active pairs, and restate L_Q, C_Q, and the Gaussian vector dimensions consistently.
Add FirpoGalvaoParker2023 and any value-function/support-function inference comparator to §5 and to the Conjecture 2/3 novelty blocks.

To target flagship tier, generalize beyond one Honest-DiD implementation: prove a class theorem for moving-budget moment-inequality confidence sets with data-dependent critical values and active-set ties, then recover Honest-DiD as a corollary.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison and tied-face definitions; then decide whether to pitch a field-tier Honest-DiD contribution or broaden the kernel to a generic moving-critical-value moment-inequality theorem for the flagship target.
